Ajam Jamaludin

Junior Geophysics Researcher

Yogyakarta, Indonesia

About Me

Geophysics graduate from Universitas Gadjah Mada with experience in evaluating machine learning systems for geophysical applications, particularly seismic signal processing and earthquake early warning. Skilled in building Python-based data pipelines for preprocessing, feature extraction, and performance validation of ML models under realistic conditions.

Strong foundation in signal processing, statistical analysis, and scientific computing. Eager to expand expertise into deep learning applications in geophysics, leveraging domain knowledge and research-oriented mindset.

Education

Bachelor of Science in Geophysics

GPA: 3.35

Universitas Gadjah Mada, Sleman, Indonesia

2019 – 2026

Thesis: Performance Evaluation of Earthquake Parameter Estimation in an Ensemble Machine Learning-Based Early Warning System: Analysis of Input Duration and Station Location Effects on Model Generalization

Experience

Earthquake Early Warning System Prototype Development

BMKG (Badan Meteorologi, Klimatologi, dan Geofisika)

Feb 2024 – Jun 2024

Internship developing ML-based earthquake early warning system for Indonesia's national seismic monitoring network.

Computational Methods Course Lab Assistant

Universitas Gadjah Mada

Aug 2023 – Jan 2024

Mentored 50+ undergraduate students in Python programming for scientific computing.

Achievements

  • 3rd Place, Three-Minute Thesis (3MT) Competition, UGM Faculty of Math & Natural Sciences (2025)
  • Earthquake Preparedness Pocket Book for Elementary School Students (2025)
  • SeisComP Software Training – End-to-end seismic data processing (2024)
  • Perintis Scholarship Recipient (2018)

Projects

Earthquake Early Warning System (EEWS)

Developed ensemble ML-based EEWS prototype with real-time P-wave detection and magnitude estimation using ObsPy and FDSN client. Achieved MAE ≈ 0.42 against BMKG catalog with fastest alert at 24s post-origin time.

PythonObsPyMachine LearningSeismic Processing

Thesis: ML-Based Earthquake Parameter Estimation

Performance evaluation of ensemble ML-based early warning system analyzing input duration and station location effects on model generalization using real seismic data from BMKG catalog.

PythonMachine LearningSeismic Analysis

Real-time Seismic Monitoring Dashboard

PyQt5 GUI with Folium-based real-time mapping and Telegram Bot API for automated earthquake alerts at BMKG.

PythonPyQt5FoliumTelegram API
